proxy_control_description: Registered base experiment using current proxy evidence.
Shuffle-within-time-bucket proxy: preserves turnover but removes most predictive coupling.
Delayed-signal proxy: degrades signal edge and modestly reduces executable turnover.
Inverted-signal proxy: reverses directional edge while preserving turnover.
